codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix commit resolves the prior blocking issues from drop-screen, preview-sidebar-panel, and preview-nav-tooltips-keyboard: multi-file drops are explicitly rejected without processing, sidebar rows now perform focus + scroll behavior (including cross-page navigation), sidebar header chips now use the same computed counts as the footer, thumbnails render real 0.2x page previews with cache/reset cleanup, and tooltip hide behavior now allows the pointer to move from highlight to tooltip so the action button remains reachable.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton plus original failed diffs (abdd51a, 9615889f7fa2e00f79d1b2a84ba0cb124e950f29, 61f5b7d) against fix diff 418339a4308220d5aa2c0584a5f4510e4608d465. The fix adequately addresses all previously blocking interaction defects with direct code evidence in DropScreen, SummaryPanel, PageNav, DocumentViewer, EntityTooltip, and accompanying tests; no new high-confidence blocking/non-blocking issues were identified.
